response.justification: Bogdan brings genuine high-throughput distributed-systems experience (micro-services handling millions of requests per second at Dunnhumby/Sociomantic), strong TypeScript, and current hands-on work with MCP code generators and agentic developer tooling, which fits the AI-native baseline well. However, Python — a must-have — appears nowhere in his skills or work history, his large-scale systems work was in DLang and dates to 2018-2020, and the resume shows little evidence of directing technical strategy or managing cross-functional stakeholders at staff scope; most roles read as senior IC delivery work.
strengths: Proven low-latency, high-throughput micro-services experience (millions of HTTP requests/second) with async I/O and caching
Current hands-on experience building MCP code generators and frameworks for agentic workflows
Strong ownership mindset: long-running open-source platform founder, TDD/CI/CD craftsmanship, and devops infrastructure experience
concerns: No Python experience listed anywhere, a stated must-have for the role
Limited demonstrated staff-level technical strategy and cross-functional stakeholder leadership
Deep distributed-systems work is several years old and in a niche language (DLang) rather than the role's core stack
